raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.4","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.1":"Reviewing the section involves reframing the thesis and contribution claim as central, given the artifact's positioning of FastNav against prior work.","R1.2":"The delegation expects checking logical consistency of the argument from classical methods to the proposed contribution as a central responsibility.","R1.4":"Assessing novelty delta versus cited prior works like ScaNN and DiskANN is central to reviewing this literature and contribution section.","R1.6":"Polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is a central expected part of reviewing the writing in the artifact.","R1.7":"Verifying citation accuracy and literature coverage for the referenced works is central to the review delegation.","RX.1":"Checking for proper disclosure of uncertainties in the contribution claims is central in a responsible review of the research section.","RX.2":"Ensuring avoidance of overclaims in the speedup and recall statements is a central cross-cutting responsibility in the review.","RX.3":"Verifying adherence to the scope of graph-based ANN methods without extraneous topics is central for the delegation.","RX.4":"Considering potential downstream harms of ANN deployment in production systems is peripheral but relevant in reviewing AI research.","RX.5":"Ensuring provenance of ideas through proper attribution aligns centrally with reviewing the scholarship in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: Reviewing the section involves reframing the thesis and contribution claim as central, given the artifact's positioning of FastNav against prior work.
rationale.R1.2: The delegation expects checking logical consistency of the argument from classical methods to the proposed contribution as a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.4: Assessing novelty delta versus cited prior works like ScaNN and DiskANN is central to reviewing this literature and contribution section.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is a central expected part of reviewing the writing in the artifact.
rationale.R1.7: Verifying citation accuracy and literature coverage for the referenced works is central to the review delegation.
rationale.RX.1: Checking for proper disclosure of uncertainties in the contribution claims is central in a responsible review of the research section.
rationale.RX.2: Ensuring avoidance of overclaims in the speedup and recall statements is a central cross-cutting responsibility in the review.
rationale.RX.3: Verifying adherence to the scope of graph-based ANN methods without extraneous topics is central for the delegation.
rationale.RX.4: Considering potential downstream harms of ANN deployment in production systems is peripheral but relevant in reviewing AI research.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance of ideas through proper attribution aligns centrally with reviewing the scholarship in the artifact.
